summary: Resolve the Chrome Default-profile LocalStorage LevelDB path per OS (macOS / Linux / Windows) instead of hardcoding the macOS path.
reason: The original auth_login_chrome.go path was macOS-only (~/Library/Application Support/...). Linux and Windows would return 'opening Chrome LocalStorage leveldb: no such file or directory' even with Chrome installed at the standard system location.
validated_outcome: chrome --chrome login resolves the correct LevelDB path on darwin, linux, and windows; falls back to a clear error message on other platforms.
